task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the TimelineCanvas shot-group menu now uses the same portal mousedown stopPropagation workaround/comment pattern as ClipAction, and SelectionContextMenu now carries the same portal-limitation comment. Covered by the shared portal-menu test run.

Verified the travel-between-images duplicate path now forwards currentFrame + nextFrame and stops precomputing/passing target_timeline_frame. The optimistic duplicate marker now uses the source frame while the RPC-returned timeline_frame remains authoritative for the new item position. Duplicate RPC/unit tests passed.

Verified TimelineEditor now extracts a stable assetKey->generationId map, resolveSelectedGenerationIdsForShotCreation reads that plain Record, and selectionShotCreationState depends on data.rows/data.meta/stableAssetGenerationMap instead of the whole data object. TimelineEditor unit tests passed.

Verified the upload pipeline now returns generationMetadata per file, and createShotWithFilesPath hydrates cache directly from that metadata with no post-upload shot_generations fetch. Upload-path and shot-creation-path tests passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified TimelineCanvas, ClipAction, and SelectionContextMenu now share the same portaled-menu mousedown stopPropagation workaround and portal-limitation comment.
Verified the travel-between-images duplicate path no longer precomputes/passes target_timeline_frame. It now forwards timelineFrame + nextTimelineFrame to the RPC path and lets SQL resolve placement.
Verified selectionShotCreationState now depends on stableAssetGenerationMap instead of the full data object, so registry churn without generation-id mapping changes does not force recomputation.
Verified createShotWithFilesPath hydrates from upload-returned generationMetadata and contains no post-upload shot_generations fetch.
